title: TBench artifact checkpoint
prompt: FAKE_TBENCH_ARTIFACT_CHECKPOINT: create the required scoreable artifact before finalizing and complete the task ledger.

commandChecks.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
text = Path('primers.fasta').read_text()
assert text.startswith('>primer_forward\n'), text
assert '>primer_reverse\n' in text, text
PY

constraints: scoreable Terminal-Bench artifacts must exist before finalization
use the task ledger to keep required output files checkpointed before slow follow-up work
